text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of emptiness and anticipation. The sparsely furnished, brightly lit room holds an almost ceremonial stillness—every sound echoes, and I'm keenly aware of my own presence. The tilted angle unsettles me, making me question the stability of my surroundings and my own position within them.

The second scene immerses me in intellectual curiosity. The bold colors and large R+D text evoke the spirit of innovation and inquiry. I am drawn to the relationship between human thought and technology displayed here. Yet, I feel like an observer on the threshold of understanding, confronted by creativity in motion and an invitation to participate in discovery.
